Standard Type: Standardized activity type (e.g. IC50 rather than Ic-50/Ic50/ic50/ic-50)
Standard Value: Standardized activity value transformed to common units: e.g. mM concentrations converted to nM
Standard Units: Selected units for 'Standard Type': e.g. concentrations are in nM

Activity Comment: standard_value was converted from uM.hr to ng.hr.mL-1 using the parent compound MW
